# NSExtensionActivationUsesStrictMatching

**Property List Key**

A Boolean value indicating whether strict or fuzzy matching is used when determining the asset types an app extension handles.

## Configuration

- **NSExtensionActivationDictionaryVersion**: The version of the parent extension-activation rule dictionary.

items.description: The version of the parent extension-activation rule dictionary.
